component.name: Cycity Desktop
次元城动漫
component.summary: Anime desktop client with vast collection of high-quality anime
次元城动漫桌面端 - 海量高画质番剧，尽在次元城！

description.p: Cycity Desktop is a comprehensive anime viewing application built for anime enthusiasts. It provides access to a vast collection of domestic and international anime resources, covering classic series, ongoing simulcasts, and independent productions. The app features ad-free high-definition playback with support for various genres including action, romance, suspense, and sci-fi.

ul.li: Vast anime library covering Japanese, Korean, Chinese, and more anime productions across all genres
Weekly synchronized updates ensuring access to the latest episodes in a timely manner
Multiple quality options for smooth HD playback adapted to network conditions
Clean, ad-free interface for uninterrupted viewing experience
Smart recommendation system based on viewing history and preferences
Danmaku (bullet comments) system for real-time interactive viewing
Advanced search with category filters by genre, year, region, and popularity
Built-in ranking charts and weekly release schedule for upcoming episodes
Playback speed control and subtitle switching support

description.p: 次元城动漫电脑版是一款专为动漫爱好者打造的全方位观看软件，提供海量国内外动漫资源，涵盖经典老番、最新连载及独立制作作品。支持高清无广告流畅播放，包含热血、恋爱、悬疑、科幻等多种类型。软件以清爽界面、超清画质和便捷操作为特色，提供个性化观看体验。

ul.li: 海量动漫资源库，涵盖日本、韩国、中国等多国动漫作品
每周同步更新，第一时间观看最新动漫内容
多种清晰度选项，根据网络状况选择最佳画质
界面干净清爽，无广告弹窗干扰
智能推荐系统，根据观看历史发现更多感兴趣内容
弹幕互动系统，与其他观众实时交流
关键词搜索与分类筛选，支持题材、年份、地区筛选
内置排行榜与排期表，精准掌握追番日程
倍速播放与字幕切换支持

screenshot.caption: Cycity Desktop main interface with anime browsing
次元城动漫主界面 - 浏览番剧
